/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chaos_editor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chaos_editor.dir/log_observer/log_observer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chaos_editor.dir/ui/editor_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chaos_editor.dir/editor_main.cpp.o -o ../bin/chaos_editor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhongfangdao/chaos-engine/third_party/lua/lib ../lib/libengine_core.a -lm -lpthread -ldl /home/zhongfangdao/chaos-engine/third_party/lua/lib/liblua5.4.so -lbpf -luring
